description_long: This is a small cylindrical jar with a wide, flat, light blue cap and a white body. The front of the container features a pink flamingo illustration and the brand name 'Skinplicity' along with the phrase 'BEAUTY MADE SIMPLE.' The product name 'Herbal Eye Gel' is printed in blue text on the front. The sides and back of the jar display detailed ingredient lists, directions, and cautionary information in fine print. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on soft pastel colors and minimalist graphics. The jar appears to be made of plastic and is likely used for storing a gel or cream product.
description: A small, cylindrical white jar with a light blue screw-on cap, featuring a pink flamingo graphic and blue product text. The design is clean and modern, with detailed labeling and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: The front view shows the light blue cap, the pink flamingo logo, the 'Skinplicity' brand, and the 'Herbal Eye Gel' product name.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the start of the ingredient list and the continuation of the product name in blue text.
description_view_2: The back view displays the full ingredient list, directions, and cautionary statements in small print.
description_view_3: This view shows the end of the directions and cautionary information, as well as the distribution details and part of the flamingo logo.
